description: The diagram illustrates the data product categories and time periods provided by the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service Natura 2000 (CLMS N2K). The CLMS N2K product offers two main types of Land Cover / Land Use (LC/LU) data. The first type is LC/LU STATUS, which provides static land cover and land use information for the individual reference years: 2006, 2012, and 2018. The second type is LC/LU CHANGE, which provides data on land cover and land use changes for the specific periods: 2006–2012 and 2012–2108.
